scripts.test:api-unit: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python -m unittest discover -s tests/unit -p "test_*.py" -v'
scripts.test:api-unit:coverage: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && mkdir -p coverage && python -m coverage run --source=app.services,app.core -m unittest discover -s tests/unit -p "test_*.py" -v && python -m coverage json -o coverage/api-unit-coverage.json'
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:ui && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:api-unit
scripts.test:unit:coverage: pnpm test:ui:coverage && pnpm test:web:coverage && pnpm test:api-unit:coverage && node scripts/report-unit-coverage.mjs
scripts.test:integration: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python -m unittest discover -s tests/integration -p "test_*.py" -v'
scripts.test:performance: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python -m unittest discover -s tests/performance -p "test_*.py" -v'
scripts.test:comprehensive: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:performance && pnpm test:journey && pnpm test:security
scripts.check: pnpm lint:web && pnpm typecheck:web && pnpm build:web
